courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Audio-First Game
genericDescription: Design gameplay around listening; mix audio cues by priority; provide non-audio alternatives for accessibility.
specificDescription: Build a game where sound is central to navigation, timing, stealth, rhythm, or discovery. Include captions, visual pulses, haptics, or other alternatives for critical cues.
gradingRubric: 30 pts audio mechanic design; 20 pts mix clarity; 20 pts accessible alternatives; 15 pts complete game loop; 15 pts documentation.
